name: Handling Uninsured Employers in Utah Work Injuries

mainEntity.name: What if my employer doesn't have workers' comp insurance in Taylorsville?
mainEntity.text: What if my employer doesn't have workers' comp insurance in Taylorsville?

acceptedAnswer.text: Utah uninsured employer statute allows direct suit against employer for full damages, plus 10% penalty on benefits owed.

suggestedAnswer.text: File Uninsured Employer Division claim with Labor Commission. Recover medical, wages, PPI like insured claims, plus negligence lawsuit possible. Common in small construction firms; protects Riverton workers from non-compliant bosses.

description: Utah uninsured employer statute allows direct suit against employer for full damages, plus 10% penalty on benefits owed.
